title: eviction error silently dropped on with_xxx_key error path
description: When f() returns Err in with_mldsa_key / with_rsa_key / with_aes_key / with_ecc_p256_key / with_ed25519_key / with_curve25519_key / with_cmac_key, the evict variable (Result<(), WolfHsmError>) is silently dropped — the eviction error is lost. The HSM cache slot may remain leaked with no diagnostic. Trigger: f returns Err AND key_evict also fails (e.g. server restarted between generate and evict). Bad behavior: caller sees only the original error; cache slot is never freed, and no error or warning about the failed eviction is surfaced.
